CreateInstance.instanceType: Monitoring instance type, default is CCE (CCE-type monitoring instance); valid values: CCE, BCM
CreateInstance.instanceSpec: Instance specification type, default is basic tier "free-v1"; valid values: advance-v1, advance-v2, free-v1
CreateInstance.needGrafana: Whether to create a Grafana instance. Can be created when no Grafana instance exists in the current region; only one Grafana instance is allowed per region.
CreateInstance.grafanaName: Provided when `needGrafana=true`; Grafana instance name, default is `admin`
CreateInstance.grafanaAdminPassword: Provided when `needGrafana=true`; Grafana password must be 8–32 characters and contain letters, digits, and symbols; allowed symbols: `!@#$%^*()`
